metadata.description: Claude Code plugin marketplace by Immy6315 — multi-agent PR reviewer and 5-role engineering org plugins.

plugins.name: gr-reviewer
plugins.description: Multi-agent PR reviewer — runs 7 specialist AI agents in parallel and posts inline GitHub comments.

plugins.name: eng-org
plugins.description: 5-role multi-agent engineering org — EM, Tech Leads, Domain Devs, independent Test agents, specialist Reviewers (architecture / security / performance / standards / observability / indexes), and a system **Architect** that produces versioned ADRs BEFORE any TL decomposes tasks. Drops a complete governance + review pipeline into any project via /eng-org:init. Ships with 6 binding guardrails (G-1..G-6) including visual-parity gate, regression-check.md per task, device-boot smoke for native deps, batch cap, and design-divergence registry. New in 0.5.0: /eng-org:test-full-suite mandatory full-suite gate (test-triage agent classifies REGRESSION/INTENTIONAL/PRE-EXISTING); G-6 marker in /merge-readiness; 4 TL agents (tl-mobile, tl-auth, tl-pets, tl-gamification).
